text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm walking to the training supply<n>store, when...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is that you, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, look who it is. Out shoppin' on<n>your own
too, Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, I have an errand at the florist.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh. It isn't every day you go to the<n>florist. I
don't even buy flowers for<n>friends' birthdays.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this won't be a present. I'd like to<n>buy some
flowers for my personal<n>use.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's kinda cool.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose you're planning to<n>make
pressed flowers, seeing how<n>you've bothered to
make the trip for<n>'em.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While that is a lovely idea, I plan to<n>use them for
a little flower<n>arrangement.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Flower arrangement?! Geez, talk<n>about being
fancy schmancy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's just a hobby of mine. It's<n>especially
useful for when I want to<n>calm my mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I know! Would you like to join me,<n>Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Me? Arrange flowers?! You can't be<n>serious.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You'll never know unless you try,<n>no? Come
along, now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Maaaaan...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder begins an impromptu<n>lesson
about each and every flower<n>on display.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She looks very relaxed as she talks<n>about the
flowers in great detail.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've walked you through the basics,<n>but you are
free to work with<n>whatever colors or shapes you<n>
please.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Like that's gonna help things... I<n>don't mind
flowers, but I dunno much<n>about 'em.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Go with what comes to you. Just<n>leave it all to
feeling. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see flower arrangement as a mirror<n>that reflects
the state of your mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When your mind is turbulent, your<n>flowers will
look wayward, no matter<n>the placement.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And when you're calm, they appear<n>serene and
poised. The same flower<n>can display different
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As such, I consider this the perfect<n>pastime for
moments of self-reflection.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you saying you have<n>something you
want to reflect on?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, not in particular. As I mentioned<n>before, I do
this as a hobby.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's fine, but know I'm always<n>around to lend
an ear if you've got<n>somethin' on your mind.
Don't be shy<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can breathe easy hearin' that. If<n>there's
anyone who takes<n>themselves too seriously,
you'd be<n>my first pick.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know you study and train even on<n>your days
off. I was startin' to worry<n>that you'd been
overdoing things.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: While I may be thorough, I would<n>never go so far.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: At least, not now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you say somethin' just<n>now?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. You shouldn't concern<n>yourself over
me, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've learned that cutting yourself<n>some slack
also leads to growth. ♪
